2006 Part D Tier Benefit File Data Dictionary
Variable Sequence Long SAS Name Variable Label Data Type Data Length Description Possible Values Value Description Notes
1 contract_id Contract ID Char 5 The unique number CMS assigns to each contract that a Part D plan has with CMS.
2 plan_id Plan ID Char 3 The unique number CMS assigns to identify a specific Part D plan benefit package within a contract.
3 tier_id Tier ID Char 2 Medicare Part D formulary tier identifier. This field represents the
